ns0:entry.ns0:title: CJackHwang/ds2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CJackHwang/ds2api
Language: go
DeepSeek-Compatible Middleware Interface: A technical exploration project in Go, focusing on high-concurrency protocol adaptation. It serves as a reference implementation for converting diverse web protocols into standardized formats.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gentleman-Programming/engram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram
Language: go
Persistent memory system for AI coding agents. Agent-agnostic Go binary with SQLite + FTS5, MCP server, HTTP API, CLI, and TUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: go
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Hysteria, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bjarneo/cliamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bjarneo/cliamp
Language: go
cliamp - Terminal music player inspired by winamp

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chaos-mesh/chaos-mesh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chaos-mesh/chaos-mesh
Language: go
A Chaos Engineering Platform for Kubernetes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chenhg5/cc-connect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chenhg5/cc-connect
Language: go
Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: entireio/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/entireio/cli
Language: go
📜 Entire CLI hooks into your Git workflow to capture AI agent sessions as you work. Sessions are indexed alongside commits, creating a searchable record of how code was written in your repo.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitleaks/gitleaks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks
Language: go
Find secrets with Gitleaks 🔑

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gohugoio/hugo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo
Language: go
The world’s fastest framework for building websites.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gosom/google-maps-scraper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gosom/google-maps-scraper
Language: go
scrape data from Google Maps. Extracts data such as the name, address, phone number, website URL, rating, reviews number, latitude and longitude, reviews,email and more for each place

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grpc/grpc-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go
Language: go
The Go language implementation of gRPC. HTTP/2 based RPC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jaegertracing/jaeger
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger
Language: go
CNCF Jaeger, a Distributed Tracing Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubescape/kubescape
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubescape/kubescape
Language: go
Kubescape is an open-source Kubernetes security platform for your IDE, CI/CD pipelines, and clusters. It includes risk analysis, security, compliance, and misconfiguration scanning, saving Kubernetes users and administrators precious time, effort, and resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ltaoo/wx_channels_download
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ltaoo/wx_channels_download
Language: go
微信视频号下载器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: meshery/meshery
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/meshery/meshery
Language: go
Meshery, the cloud native manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moonD4rk/HackBrowserData
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moonD4rk/HackBrowserData
Language: go
Extract and decrypt browser data, supporting multiple data types, runnable on various operating systems (macOS, Windows, Linux).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openclaw/gogcli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openclaw/gogcli
Language: go
Google Workspace in your terminal.
